title: Verify Spine v2 migration is terminal
reason: Read-only verification of all 16 migration-matrix flows vs code; suite GREEN (1804 passed). Verdict NOT-TERMINAL (narrow): safety-critical flows are event_truth with parity, but the order-status/spawn state machine (Atomic submit claim) stays legacy_truth by documented deferral. Distilled to pkl/process/migration-history.md; follow-up WO needed to event-source order-status/spawn.

title: Engine layer ADR audit
reason: Read-only engine audit vs ADR-001/002/003 + spine INV-1..9: all CONFIRMED with file:line; engine subset 157 GREEN. Findings: clock CONFIRMED-intent/DRIFT-wording (utcnow seam + injected now), 2 candidate ADRs (clock-seam pattern, two-driver TradingState), stale-doc notes; feeds WO-0006, awaits independent review.

title: Adapter + Store layer ADR audit
reason: Read-only adapter/store audit vs ADR-001/002/004: all CONFIRMED with file:line (alpaca isolated to broker/marketdata; client_order_id=order.id stable idempotency key; append-only event log with UNIQUE dedupe_key; dual-store parity verifiers). Store subset 37/39 GREEN. Candidate ADRs: none. Only carried-over caveat: order-status still legacy_truth (WO-0007). Feeds WO-0006, awaits independent review.

title: Facade + API layer ADR audit
reason: Read-only facade/api audit vs ADR-005: all clauses CONFIRMED with file:line (Contract-5 ratchet empty = every route behind the typed facade; facade_error_to_http domain-error mapping; actor:str on all command methods; no store/engine leakage). Facade/api subset 72/72 GREEN. Candidate ADRs: none. Finding: .importlinter Contract-5 header comment is stale (punch-list now empty). Feeds WO-0006, awaits independent review.

title: UI (Streamlit cockpit) ADR audit
reason: Read-only UI audit vs ADR-005 + invariants 4-7: all CONFIRMED with file:line (cockpit imports no app.*, grimp proof green; no alpaca; requests-only HTTP client; owns no engine state). UI subset 32/32 GREEN. Candidate ADRs: none; no stale docs. Feeds WO-0006, awaits independent review.

title: Add a mypy static-typecheck gate (baseline-and-ratchet)
reason: ADR-007 accepted; wired mypy over app/ (pyproject [tool.mypy] 16-module grandfather ratchet, requirements, ci.yml step, CLAUDE.md/testing-model deferred->wired). Also excluded vendored .ai-os/.claude from ruff (fixed PR-3 CI red). Verified: ruff check . PASS, mypy app/ Success, full suite 1804 passed.

title: Emit routine order-status ExecutionEvents + dual-store parity (no read-flip)
reason: Split-A of WO-0007. Every routine order-status transition now co-writes a deterministic order-status ExecutionEvent into execution_events in BOTH stores, atomically with the orders.status + audit write; orders.status stays authoritative (no read-flip, no projector). Sites: claim (SUBMIT_PENDING, occurrence-keyed), transition_order (SUBMITTED/PARTIALLY_FILLED/FILLED/CANCELED/REJECTED + fill-progress self-loop), and the two direct-CANCELED bypass writers plan_close_session + plan_flatten_position (scope correction from adversarial design review). New pure helper execution_event_for_routine_transition; planners untouched; TIMEOUT_QUARANTINE defense-in-depth guard on shared-format keys. Provenance deliberately ENGINE/LOCAL (safe under-claim; faithful broker provenance deferred to WO-0007b). Verified: ruff PASS, mypy app/ Success, full suite 1858 passed / 5 skipped / 0 failed (1863 collected; +6 quarantine-consumer regression). Adversarial verify (5 skeptics) INV-9 / dedupe / dual-store parity / scope-test-integrity / provenance all HOLDS. Flagged residual (out of scope): timeout_quarantined_order_ids docstring rationale now stale (output unchanged). Next: WO-0007b (projector + read-flip + broker provenance); awaits independent review before beta reliance.

title: Cleanup residuals — projectors docstring + .ai-os scope-checker comment parsing
reason: Two human-authorized residual fixes from the WO-0007a review. (1) Corrected the stale timeout_quarantined_order_ids docstring in app/events/projectors.py (routine path now also emits SUBMITTED/FILLED/CANCELED since WO-0007a; output unchanged, explained why the latest-wins fold stays correct). (2) Fixed .ai-os/scripts/check_work_order_scope.py::extract_list to strip inline # comments so a commented allowed_paths catch-all parses to the glob (was a false SCOPE CHECK FAILED for any WO using `- "**"  # comment`); new regression test tests/test_ai_os_scope_checker.py (RED->GREEN). Verified: 5 new tests pass, WO-0007a scope check now PASSED, ruff + mypy clean, full suite 1863 passed / 5 skipped / 0 failed (1868 collected).

title: Faithful per-transition provenance for routine order-status ExecutionEvents
reason: Follow-up to WO-0007a (human authorized faithful provenance). Routine order-status ExecutionEvents now carry faithful source/authority derived in-store by _routine_event_provenance(order,new): claim + CANCELED-with-no-broker_order_id => ENGINE/LOCAL; SUBMITTED/PARTIALLY_FILLED/FILLED/REJECTED + broker-confirmed CANCELED => BROKER_REST/BROKER_AUTHORITATIVE. Option B (in-store derivation, no monitoring/facade churn); pure planners untouched; INV-9 intact; not the read-flip (WO-0007b). Adversarial-verify pass (wf_e548dec7-f63, 2 of 3 skeptics) found a real over-claim in the initial old_status==CREATED proxy (the SUBMITTING->CANCELED submit-failure release is engine-local but has old status SUBMITTING); fixed at root cause by discriminating on broker_order_id is None (commit 9c1c30a) + 2 regression tests. Proposed ADR-008 documents the decision (WO-0006). Verified: ruff clean, mypy app/ Success, full suite 1890 passed / 5 skipped / 0 failed (1895 collected). Independent cross-model review batched with ADR-008 (event-log-adjacent).

title: ADR synthesis + project-state report
reason: Synthesized the audit wave (WO-0001..0005 + 0008 + 0007a) via a read-only 8-agent fan-out into project-state-report.md. Verdicts: engine/adapter-store/facade-api/UI all CONFIRMED (zero real code-vs-ADR drift; the lone WO-0002 'drift' is clock-WORDING, intent confirmed); migration NOT-TERMINAL (narrow) on the order-status flow, remediated by WO-0007a (eventing) + WO-0009 (provenance), with WO-0007b (projector+read-flip) the remaining gated step. Drafted proposed ADR-008 (order-status event provenance; NOT accepted). Corrected PKL: architecture-map.md stale '(now-terminal)' claim + migration-history.md change-log (testing-model.md already current post-WO-0008). Drafted code-fix orders to queue: WO-0011 (stale doc/comment refresh + shadow-fills NEEDS-INPUT) and WO-0012 (mypy grandfather burn-down). Human-decision batch (report S7): WO-0007b sign-off+independent review, ADR acceptances, WO-0012 scheduling, command-auth beta posture, CANCEL_PENDING/filled_quantity residuals. Suite baseline 1890 passed/5 skipped (1895 collected); ruff/mypy/import-linter green. Zero ADRs accepted without human approval.

title: Refresh stale migration-era doc comments
reason: Doc/comment-only refresh of superseded pre-flip/pre-WO-0007a wording (flagged by WO-0001/0002/0003/0007a, consolidated by WO-0006). Corrected: app/store/core.py FillPlan.execution_event comment (fills are event_truth; fill table is a parity-checked read model), app/models.py ExecutionEventType docstring (emission caught up via wave-3c/3d/3e + WO-0007a/0009; only WO-0007b projector/flip open), .importlinter header + Contract-5 comments (punch-list EMPTY, boundary fully enforced; comment-only), docs/MIGRATION_MATRIX.md (HISTORICAL banner -> live sources + fixed cockpit and import-linter enforcement cells), and tests/test_spine_phase3_shadow_fills.py docstring. Resolved the shadow-fills NEEDS-INPUT: its 2 skips are the intentional (store,helper) parametrize cross-product (each store has only its own append helper), NOT dead/removed-API skips; both prior claims were wrong. No logic/contract/behavior change. Verified: ruff clean, mypy Success, import-linter 5 kept/0 broken, full suite 1890 passed/5 skipped/0 failed (1895 collected).

title: Order-status projector + read-flip to event_truth
reason: The read-flip is DONE (human sign-off given). Recon found the WO unsound as titled (WO-0007a left the SUBMITTING->CREATED release + CANCEL_PENDING entry un-evented). Stage A evented both (SUBMIT_RELEASED occurrence-keyed + CANCEL_PENDING one-shot, ENGINE/LOCAL, both stores). Stage B built project_order_status (latest-lifecycle-event-wins fold). Stage C1 proved the projection reconstructs the live column across every lifecycle incl. released->CREATED + live CANCEL_PENDING. Stage D flipped get_order/list_orders (both stores + all order-returning paths) to derive STATUS from the event log (column demoted to co-written read-model; hand-corrupted column proven not to surface), added an init backfill reconstructing pre-eventing orders, and flipped MIGRATION_MATRIX 'Atomic submit claim' -> event_truth (the last legacy_truth flow; migration substantially terminal). Guard added: routine transition_order refuses TIMEOUT_QUARANTINE (evented-only). 3 adversarial-verify passes (wf_bb06bf7b-99f, wf_08c2fb09-b99, + the A-C1 pass) all HOLD. Verified: ruff clean, mypy app/ Success, full suite 1943 passed / 5 skipped / 0 failed (1948 collected). CAVEATS: STATUS only (filled_quantity event-sourcing deferred — not universally the FILL sum); PRE-BETA-RELIANCE gates HUMAN-only and NOT done here: ADR-008 formal acceptance (left Proposed) + independent cross-model review. Optional follow-up: replay.py ReadModelProjection order-status extension.

title: Complete the event-truth flip on the order-status write path + backfill (REV-0001 P0s)
reason: Remediates REV-0001 (Codex BLOCK). F-001 (P0): claim_order_for_submission now derives status from project_order_status under the lock in both stores, not the raw orders.status column, so a drifted column can't re-claim a log-SUBMITTED order. Sibling raw-column readers (transition_order/flatten/reconcile/close/exposure) documented safe under the co-write invariant (every status write co-appends a lifecycle event, verified writer-by-writer + independently re-verified), not rewritten; a defense-in-depth assert pins the invariant at the claim site (fail-loud, never blind-resubmit). F-002 (P0): backfill keys on status-lifecycle-event ABSENCE via projectors.ORDER_STATUS_EVENT_TYPES (FILL excluded) instead of projected==CREATED, fixing the released-cycle clobber while still reconstructing pre-eventing FILLED orders; proven new-fires subset of old. F-003: ADR-008 amended (SUBMIT_RELEASED/CANCEL_PENDING, ENGINE/LOCAL, ADR-001 note; stays Proposed). 12 dual-store RED->GREEN (tests/test_wo0013_event_truth_writepath.py). Verified: full suite 1983 passed/5 skipped/0 failed, ruff clean, mypy Success, import-linter 5/0. Adversarial re-verify wf_eb46fdce-662 (VER-13a/13b/X) all PASS. GATE NOT cleared: event-truth re-touch -> re-review packet REV-0003; ADR-008 still needs human acceptance.

title: Fix fractional trade-size truncation in the alpaca market-data stream (REV-0002 F-003)
reason: Remediates REV-0002 F-003 (a bug the WO-0012 type-cleanup introduced): int((existing.volume or 0)+trade.size) truncated fractional trade.size before the min-volume gate. Human decision D-1 = preserve fractional: volume is now float end-to-end (MarketSnapshot, MarketSnapshotView, fake, seed annotations); int() removed. RED->GREEN: fractional accumulation preserved (100+0.5+0.25=100.75) and a fractional volume round-trips through the API view (previously a Pydantic int_from_float error). No remaining int()/round() of volume/trade.size; no consumer needs int; volume never persisted (no schema migration). Not a human-gated surface (market-data working data). Verified: 265 marketdata/strategy/facade tests + full suite green, mypy clean. Adversarial re-verify VER-14 PASS.

title: Make a deferred manual-flatten operator-visible + thread the command actor (REV-0002 F-001/F-002)
reason: Remediates REV-0002 F-001/F-002 (Codex ACCEPT-WITH-CHANGES). Human decision D-2 = explicit response field. F-001: FlattenResult.deferred / FlattenResponse.deferred + deferred_order_status, keyed on plan.deferral_event is not None (NOT the FLATTEN_EXISTING outcome, so an idempotent own-flatten even at live SUBMITTED status stays deferred=False); cockpit renders a distinct 'no manual order submitted -- already exiting; monitoring' toast. F-002: command actor threaded route->facade->flatten_position->plan_flatten_position (manual_flatten_deferred payload) and ->_insert_sell_intent_* (created manual-flatten's sell_intent_created payload), both stores, default 'system'; protection-tick create stays 'system'. INVARIANTS INV-034/036 follow-ups Resolved. Purely additive (INV-9): flatten decision + no-blind-cancel branch + state byte-identical vs HEAD~1. Dual-store+facade+cockpit RED->GREEN over SUBMITTED/CANCEL_PENDING/TIMEOUT_QUARANTINE; no test weakened. Verified: full suite green, ruff/mypy/import-linter clean. Adversarial re-verify VER-15a/15b PASS. GATE NOT cleared: manual-flatten is human-gated -> re-review packet REV-0003.

title: Re-review of the REV-0001/REV-0002 remediation (event-truth write-path + manual-flatten)
reason: Independent re-review (Codex) of the WO-0013/0014/0015 remediation. Verdict ACCEPT-WITH-CHANGES: WO-0013 (event-truth write path) and WO-0015 (manual-flatten deferral/actor) gates CLEARED -- Codex independently re-derived the claim-gate projection, the lifecycle-event-absence backfill, the orders.status writer audit (co-write invariant holds), and the additive deferred discriminator. One P1 (F-001): ADR-008 as amended overclaimed authority-weighted status projection; project_order_status is latest-lifecycle-event-wins by sequence + transition-graph and never reads source/authority (confirmed: authority is nowhere a resolution input in app/). Fixed doc-only (option a, human-confirmed): ADR-008 clarified to state authority is provenance/audit-only for this flow, with authority-aware resolution recorded as deferred future work; pinned by new authority-independent latest-wins tests in tests/test_wo0007b_stageb_projector.py. ADR-008 stays Proposed pending human acceptance. Reviewer's full-suite check was unverified due to a Python 3.14.5 SQLite ResourceWarning artifact in unrelated tests; suite green in the supported env here (1983 passed / 5 skipped / 0 failed, ruff/mypy/import-linter clean). See work/review/REV-0003/disposition.md.

title: CAMPAIGN-0001 Wave-1: ATTACK-CHAIN (cross-container red-team)
reason: Codex ACCEPT(non-gating). Author-side re-verified in Python 3.12.3 (frozen b600101==HEAD app/). UC-001 crash-window double-submit (proposed P0) REFUTED: redrive re-submits under stable client_order_id; real AlpacaPaperAdapter recovers the duplicate via get_order_by_client_id (repro: 1 venue order) -- ADR-002-sanctioned reused-key reconciliation, not blind resubmit. Residual = external Alpaca uniqueness assumption (beta pre-flight, not code). UC-002 CONFIRMED P1 both stores: operator actor dropped on cancel audit event (facade.cancel accepts actor; transition_order/plan_transition_order carry only {from,to}); F-002 class not extended to cancel -> gated WO. See work/review/REV-0004/disposition.md.

title: CAMPAIGN-0001 Wave-1: ENGINE (runtime execution core)
reason: Codex BLOCK (ENG-001 P0). Re-verified in 3.12.3. ENG-001 CONFIRMED but P0->P1: kill_switched cached once (monitoring.py:301), stale across the per-symbol await, so a concurrent POST/kill can let a PROTECTION_FLOOR intent+CREATED order be created under HALTED. Reviewer's get_snapshot-flip repro is a test artifact (real feed has no inner await) but the TOCTOU is reachable via any real await (adapter.cancel). NOT a venue bypass: claim gate (INV-021/060) blocks submission (0 to broker). Harm = intent/audit + stranded CREATED order -> gated WO. ENG-002 CONFIRMED P2 (quarantine resolver not under loop budget; read-only). See work/review/REV-0005/disposition.md.

title: CAMPAIGN-0001 Wave-1: STORE-SPEC (contract + planners)
reason: Codex BLOCK (F-001 P0). Re-verified in 3.12.3, both stores. REV-0006-F-001 CONFIRMED, P0->P1/NEEDS-HUMAN: SqliteStateStore.flatten_position uses 4 separate _tx() commits under one lock; a hard crash between approve-commit and dispatch-commit strands a durable manual_flatten/approved/order_id=NULL (memory store is atomic -> sqlite-only). Fails INV-050 STATEMENT verbatim (docs/INVARIANTS.md:328-339). Only a hard crash strands (logical dispatch rejects self-heal atomically); recovers forward on next flatten. Code documents recover-forward (sqlite.py:1633-1652) -> genuine code-vs-invariant DECISION GAP on a gated surface (CLAUDE.md conflict rule). Interim autonomous-protection gap: orphan intent reads active so protection tick stands down (monitoring.py:338). Human choice A(bless+amend INV-050+close gap) or B(single-tx). REV-0006-F-002 CONFIRMED P2 (bare ValueError->422 vs ABC OrderTransitionError->409; client-unreachable). See work/review/REV-0006/disposition.md.

title: CAMPAIGN-0001 Wave-1: EVENTS (event sourcing)
reason: Codex BLOCK (two P1s). Re-verified in 3.12.3. REV-0007-F001 PARTIAL P1->P2: runtime parity omits order-status (reproduced divergence ok=True) but it's the disclosed scope-note deferral (replay.py:121-141), not an ADR-004 required test, compensated by test_wo0007a_stage4_dual_store_parity.py; divergence single-writer-unreachable. Follow-up: add order-status to runtime verifier. REV-0007-F002 PARTIAL(reachability REFUTED) P1->P2: fold has no terminality guard BUT append_execution_event has ZERO production callers (grep app/) -- all prod writes go through validated, transition-guarded planners; malformed FILL/illegal transition unreachable in prod; INV-075 guards it. Doc nit: ADR-008/INV-075 wording implies fold consults ORDER_TRANSITIONS; bound is actually the write path. See work/review/REV-0007/disposition.md.

title: CAMPAIGN-0001 Wave-1: ARCH (holistic architecture)
reason: Codex BLOCK (ARCH-001 P1). Re-verified with the REAL lint-imports (baseline 5 kept,0 broken). ARCH-001 CONFIRMED mechanics, P1->P2 (latent): a new routes_*.py not in the hand-enumerated Contract-5 source list, or a listed route importing app.api.deps.get_store (raw StateStore, allow_indirect_imports=True), keeps the linter green; control (direct import from listed route) -> 4 kept,1 broken. INV-074/.importlinter comments overclaim total closure. But NO current route exploits it (grep empty), no independent test guards it -> forward-hardening. ARCH-002 CONFIRMED P2: facade module docstrings stale (claim P1-only; actually 12/12 commands +17/20 queries real, no protocol drift). See work/review/REV-0008/disposition.md.

title: Interim spine synthesis (Wave 1)
reason: Wave-1 interim gate = PASS with a Tier-1 remediation set + one human decision outstanding. NO live P0 survived verification (all 3 P0-candidates resolved: UC-001 REFUTED, ENG-001->P1, F-001->P1/NEEDS-HUMAN). Net: 0 P0, 3 P1 (ENG-001 kill-switch intent, UC-002 cancel actor, F-001 flatten atomicity decision), 5 P2, 1 REFUTED. Deepest guards held: single-writer, claim-gate kill re-check, write-path transition guards (INV-075), adapter client_order_id idempotency. All remediations touch gated surfaces -> fresh gated WOs (human-approve -> Claude authors test-first -> Codex re-review). Every Codex finding's MECHANICS were accurate; corrections were to severity+reachability, which the supported-env re-run exists to establish. See work/review/CAMPAIGN-0001/synthesis.md.

title: CAMPAIGN-0001 Wave-2: STORE-IMPL (dual-store parity)
reason: Codex ACCEPT-WITH-CHANGES; only finding = REV-0006-F-001 flatten atomicity (known, already fixed 27bbffb + REV-0019-cleared). Verifier refinement: sqlite flatten was up to FOUR sequential commits (wider window than the packet's 'supersede+create+approve in one tx'); the named APPROVED-no-order gap unchanged and the F-001 fix folds the whole branch into one _tx(). Adversarial dual-store parity scan (create_order_for_candidate/append_fill/close_session/transition/quarantine/reconcile) found NO other sequential multi-commit divergence -> Codex's single finding complete. STORE-IMPL gate CLEARS. See work/review/REV-0009/disposition.md.

title: CAMPAIGN-0001 Wave-2: KERNEL
reason: Codex ACCEPT (no fresh finding). Completeness lead NaN->risk_limit_reason/CAPI gate REFUTED: the gate has no internal finite-check but every ingress is gated upstream (limit_price_reason/finite_number_reason, whole_count_reason on int qty, fill_value_reason before every fill persist in both stores + projector, _env_float on limits). Repro: poisoned fills rejected, current_exposure stays finite. Honest note: single-layer defense -> W2-RISK (P3, optional) add finite_number_reason(exposure_before_order) as defense-in-depth. KERNEL gate CLEARS. See work/review/REV-0010/disposition.md.

title: CAMPAIGN-0001 Wave-2: BROKER
reason: Codex ACCEPT; UC-001-refuted class CONFIRMED. Deterministic client_order_id=order.id (alpaca_paper.py:245/255; mock broker-<id>); idempotent resubmit (dup-client_order_id -> return existing venue id; two submits collapse to 1 venue order); ambiguous/timeout -> TIMEOUT_QUARANTINE + strictly read-only reconcile by client_order_id (monitoring.py:700-727/957/985), never blind resubmit. Repro pasted. BROKER gate CLEARS. Beta pre-flight (not code): confirm live Alpaca rejects dup client_order_id for ALL states incl post-fill. See work/review/REV-0011/disposition.md.

title: CAMPAIGN-0001 Wave-2: MARKETDATA
reason: Codex ACCEPT OVERRIDDEN -> INCOMPLETE by completeness critic. W2-STALE (P1, Codex MISSED): market-data staleness is FEED-WIDE not per-symbol -- the .stale flag consumers gate on derives from a single _last_message_at clock (alpaca_stream.py:158) advanced by ANY symbol; per-symbol updated_at exists but is never a gate. A quiet held symbol's stale price passes protection.py:115/strategy.py:89/monitoring.py:174,196. Reproduced against the REAL AlpacaMarketDataStream + real floor_breach_reason: masked real breach (no protective exit) AND spurious market exit on a stale dip; control flips solely on whether another symbol ticked. Live in beta config (fake feed doesn't model it -> tests+review missed it). Violates safety core (invalid data must halt/quarantine, never drive submission). MARKETDATA gate DOES NOT CLEAR -> gated WO (protective-floor surface): per-symbol freshness gate + keep feed-wide clock as connection-liveness; human decision on approach. See work/review/REV-0012/disposition.md.

title: CAMPAIGN-0001 Wave-2: FACADE-API
reason: Codex ACCEPT-WITH-CHANGES (one P1). W2-CAND (P1) CONFIRMED (shared root REV-0014): create_candidate inserts unconditionally both stores (memory:556-557/sqlite:1124-1125), no active-candidate dedup, while create_sell_intent enforces single-flight atomically; double-approval -> two distinct local BUY order intents; reachable via strategy-loop TOCTOU (strategy_loop.py:146 vs :165) + beta-default-on POST /api/dev/candidates. Repro both stores: 2 PENDING + 2 BUY orders vs sell intents=1. P1 not P0 (claim gate still gates venue). W2-SESS (P2, Codex missed; UC-002 class) CONFIRMED: close_session drops operator actor (facade store_backed.py:922-928; store has no actor param; session_closed payload omits it) while kill-switch/pause-buys persist it; repro HTTP shows session_closed lacks actor. raw-500 lead REFUTED for reachable inputs (466 hostile reqs both backends, 0x5xx; latent missing-wrap on no-try read routes only). FACADE-API gate DOES NOT CLEAR -> W2-CAND (shared) + W2-SESS. See work/review/REV-0013/disposition.md.

title: CAMPAIGN-0001 Wave-2: STRATEGY + approval
reason: Codex ACCEPT-WITH-CHANGES (one P1, same root as REV-0013). W2-CAND (P1) CONFIRMED: buy-side single-flight is caller-side convention (open_symbols snapshot once/tick) only; authoritative create_candidate inserts unconditionally -> duplicate PENDING + two BUY orders on double-approve. evaluate() determinism + NaN gating SPOT-CONFIRMED clean (IO-free, rejects non-finite before arithmetic, no false final assert). STRATEGY gate DOES NOT CLEAR until W2-CAND remediated (shared gated WO: store-authoritative active-candidate dedup both stores atomic w/ insert + loop treats collision as no-op + dual-store/dev-inject/double-approval regression). See work/review/REV-0014/disposition.md.

title: Wave-2 container synthesis (REV-0009..0014)
reason: Wave-2 gate: 3 of 6 containers CLEAR (STORE-IMPL, KERNEL, BROKER); 3 HOLD (MARKETDATA, FACADE-API, STRATEGY). Net new confirmed: 2 P1 (W2-CAND candidate single-flight REV-0013/0014; W2-STALE feed-wide staleness REV-0012), 1 P2 (W2-SESS session-close actor), 1 P3 (W2-RISK finite hardening). Refuted: NaN->risk gate (unreachable), reachable raw-500 (0x5xx over 466 hostile reqs). Known-already-fixed: REV-0006-F-001. COMPLETENESS-CRITIC recovered TWO defects Codex's ACCEPTs missed (W2-STALE P1, W2-SESS P2), validating the two-layer design (independent review + internal adversarial completeness pass on every ACCEPT). No live P0 across the spine Wave-1+2; open risk concentrated in the 2 new P1s, both remediable without touching the event-sourced core. See work/review/CAMPAIGN-0001/synthesis.md (Wave 2 scorecard).

title: Re-review of the Tier-1 gated remediation (F-001, ENG-001, UC-002, ADR-008/INV-075)
reason: Independent re-review (Codex) of the three gated Tier-1 fixes + the ADR-008/INV-075 wording. Verdict ACCEPT-WITH-CHANGES. Gates CLEARED: REV-0006-F-001 (sqlite flatten single-tx atomicity), UC-002 (cancel operator-actor propagation, both branches, system default), ADR-008/INV-075 wording (pure sequence fold; legality at plan_transition_order, no ORDER_TRANSITIONS-consultation claim) -- all independently re-derived. Gate NOT cleared: ENG-001. REV-0019-F-001 (P1) -- the create_sell_intent store gate closes only the pre-create race; _open_protective_exit then separately awaits transition_sell_intent(APPROVED)/create_order_for_sell_intent/append_event(PROTECTION_TRIGGERED) with no further HALTED check, so a kill in that post-create window leaves an ORDERED intent + CREATED sell order + PROTECTION_TRIGGERED event under HALTED in both stores (INV-060 audit-integrity + stranded-order; P1 not P0 -- claim gate still blocks venue submission). Independently reproduced dual-store on Python 3.12.3 (memory/sqlite: halted [('ordered',True)] ['created'] 1), matching Codex exactly. REV-0019-F-002 (P2, doc-only): stale flatten comment app/store/sqlite.py:1659-1678 + test docstring test_phase7_flatten_atomic.py:130-144 still describe the pre-F-001 multi-commit/crash-window model. Follow-up: ENG-001 needs an atomic exit-open (create->approve->order->audit) under the HALTED check + a post-create-kill dual-store regression; two shapes (A gate create_order_for_sell_intent / B single atomic store op) pending human decision on the kill-switch gated surface; F-002 batches as doc cleanup. See work/review/REV-0019/disposition.md.

title: Re-review of the ENG-001 follow-up (atomic protection exit-open)
reason: Independent re-review (Codex) of commit 7d41e4d on the authoritative env (Python 3.12.13, single clean commit 9fd1e74, no checkout movement). Verdict ACCEPT. ENG-001/REV-0019-F-001 gate CLEARED: the whole exit-open (dedup->HALTED check->create->approve->dispatch->audit) is one store-atomic unit with NO await between the HALTED check and the durable writes; Codex reproduced route {open:1,transition:0}, last-await kill -> halted [] [] 0 both stores + paused 1, dispatch reject -> InvalidOrderError with 0 artifacts + no active intent, legit concurrent -> single-flight (1/1/1, event_link+same_return), claim gate backstop blocked kill_switch. REV-0019-F-002 (stale flatten comment) CLEARED. Dual confirmation: author in-process halted [] [] 0 + Codex 3.12.13; verified 7d41e4d is an ancestor of 9fd1e74 and app/ identical to current tip. Kill-switch surface passed independent review; Wave-1 Tier-1 set (F-001/ENG-001/UC-002) fully closed. See work/review/REV-0020/disposition.md.

title: Re-review of the Wave-2 remediation batch (W2-CAND/STALE/SESS/RISK)
reason: Independent re-review (Codex) of commit 2aac709 on the authoritative env (Python 3.12.13, single clean commit 9fd1e74). Verdict ACCEPT; all four gates CLEARED. W2-CAND: 20 concurrent create_candidate -> 1 candidate/event both stores, invalid still raises, APPROVED active, ORDERED re-buy allowed, different sessions not deduped. W2-STALE (protective-floor): real AlpacaMarketDataStream marks quiet symbol stale while fresh keeps feed clock current ({FRESH:False,QUIET_BELOW:True,QUIET_ABOVE:True}), total outage all-stale, truth table widen-only (old_true_new_false=False). W2-SESS: session_closed payload stamps operator-*/system both stores, other summary fields unchanged, test corrected-not-weakened. W2-RISK: finite under-cap None, NaN/+-Inf -> nonfinite_risk_input_non_finite. Noted (not a defect): per-symbol staleness intentionally freezes a legitimately-illiquid quiet symbol past the window (safety fail-safe; stale_after_minutes is the knob). Dual confirmation (author 2044 suite + Codex 3.12.13); verified 2aac709 ancestor of 9fd1e74, app/ identical to current tip. MARKETDATA/FACADE-API/STRATEGY containers now clear. See work/review/REV-0021/disposition.md.

title: CAMPAIGN-0001 complete: all gated remediations cleared independent re-review
reason: All human-gated remediations from the whole-codebase cross-model review have cleared independent cross-model re-review on the authoritative Python 3.12 env. Wave-1: F-001 (flatten atomicity), ENG-001 (kill-switch, via the atomic exit-open follow-up), UC-002 (cancel actor), ADR-008/INV-075 wording -> REV-0019 re-run + REV-0020 ACCEPT. Wave-2: W2-CAND (candidate single-flight), W2-STALE (per-symbol staleness, protective-floor), W2-SESS (session-close actor), W2-RISK (risk fail-closed) -> REV-0021 ACCEPT. NO live P0 was ever found across the spine; every confirmed P1/P2 remediated test-first, dual-confirmed (author in-process + Codex independent 3.12.13), and gate-cleared. Full suite 2044 passed / 0 failed; ruff/mypy/import-linter(5-0) clean. The dev branch (claude/fable-mode-os-install-1dlyk8) carries the code + the full consolidated review record and is a clean fast-forward superset of master -> merge-ready pending final human merge/naming decisions.

title: ExecutionEnvelope entity, state machine, events, dual-store persistence (ADR-009 §2-3, §6)
reason: W3 wave, first WO. ExecutionEnvelope entity with all ADR-009 §2 hard rails validated at construction; §3 status machine in transitions.py (incl. gate-approved pre-activation escape edges — ADR amended); §6 event family with ADR-008 provenance (lifecycle ENGINE/LOCAL + actor payload, fills broker-authoritative; envelope_activated/completed/cancelled amended in for replayability; ExecutionEvent gains additive nullable envelope_id, no schema_version bump, _migrate covers pre-W3 DBs). Both stores behavior-identical via shared pure planners: single-ACTIVE-per-intent (lock scan + SQLite partial unique index), atomic supersession (concurrent supersedes -> exactly one ACTIVE successor, mutation-checked), remaining_quantity decremented ONLY by deduped fills (overfill -> recorded + BREACHED; freeze never exited by a fill). INV-076..079 registered. 132 new tests; full gate green (ruff/format/mypy/lint-imports/pytest exit 0). T1 human approval granted in-chat; ADR decisions delegated and recorded. Queued for independent review with the wave (WO-0022).

title: Pure sell-side policy rebuild — regime-adaptive LASE core (ADR-009 §1/§7, research notes)
reason: New app/sellside/ package: pure decide(envelope, snapshot tape, injected clock, envelope-event history) with internal bar aggregation, gap-aware ATR, anchored VWAP, self-calibrating RVOL, nonparametric quantile fade detector (strict quantile + median-scale gate), five-regime classifier (fade precedence, UNCERTAIN conservative), ATR-multiple trails (one-bar/Chandelier/Recovery), working stop = running max of per-step candidates (monotone by construction, mutation-checked), per-step trail-floor invariant, participation-capped tranche exits, cooldown/budget accounting from history only. validate_action is the shared plan/write-time hard-rail check for WO-0019 (D-3). .importlinter contract 6 confines the package to models + abstract marketdata types. 105 tests incl. hypothesis properties. Full gate green (ruff/format/mypy 63 files/lint-imports 6-0/pytest exit 0). Reoriented mid-WO onto the final planning drop before any production commit; divergences (missing LASE docs; .importlinter vs pyproject) amended into the WO. Non-gated WO per the W3 operating agreement.

title: Envelope approval surface + flatten/kill-switch precedence (ADR-009 §1, §4)
reason: Gated WO (kill switch / manual flatten / submission delegation), T2 approved in-chat. approve_envelope_activation in both stores: dedup -> HALTED check -> create -> approve -> activate -> events under one lock/tx (ENG-001 shape); kill-first blocks with zero artifacts (mutation-checked), kill-after freezes the activated envelope in the same atomic unit as the control change; release never auto-resumes; any ->ACTIVE refused while HALTED. EnvelopeApprovalGate (evaluate DEFERs, approve delegates to the atomic op, reject = pre-activation escape edges only). Manual flatten preempts: create/flat outcomes cancel all non-terminal symbol envelopes through legal edges BEFORE the flatten's own writes, same atomic unit; ADR-003/WO-0015 deferral unchanged and deliberately leaves the live exit's envelope managing it (INV-081). INV-080/081 registered. 37 test runs both stores; test_phase7_flatten_atomic.py untouched and green. Full gate green. Facade/route wiring deferred to WO-0020 (visible deviation, no consumer yet). Queues for independent cross-model review with the wave (gated surfaces).

title: Broker-adapter replace/edit seam (pre-requisite for WO-0019)
reason: Drafted at the WO-0019 tripwire (no replace call on the adapter seam), T3a approved in-chat. BrokerAdapter.replace_order added: contract mirrors submit_order (AIR-001 non-empty NEW id; ADR-002 taxonomy: 429 transient, definitive 4xx Terminal, 5xx/transport Ambiguous -> quarantine + reconcile by client_order_id, never blind-re-replace; deterministic client_order_id with duplicate-recovery via get_order_by_client_id). Implemented in alpaca_paper (SDK replace_order_by_id, REAL method name pinned by test per the X-002 FINDING pattern), mock (deterministic; old order CANCELED w/ fills preserved; replacement discoverable by client id), sim (fail_replace_when chaos predicate). 11 tests; full gate green. Unblocks WO-0019 (T3).

title: Codify the cross-model collaboration lane into the AI OS (v1, piloting)
reason: Drafted 2026-07-12 at the collab-lane discussion; deleted same day at Ameen's direction: wait for the SOL-0001 pilot round to come back before codifying anything into .ai-os. The protocol content (lanes taxonomy, contamination-sequencing rule, contract-freeze precondition, named empirical arbiter, crosswise consolidation, packet dispositions) is preserved in the deleted draft at commit 6c50dcd and in work/collab/SOL-KICKOFF.md; re-draft at SOL-0001 close-out with the pilot's lessons folded in. No .ai-os file was ever touched.

title: Engine seam — write-time envelope validation + ENVELOPE_PLAN_DIVERGENCE (ADR-009 §1, §5)
reason: Gated WO, T3 approved in-chat after the WO-0019a tripwire clear. stage_envelope_action (both stores): HALTED check -> write-time validate_action (same shared function as plan time, D-3, mutation-checked) -> order + ENVELOPE_ACTION accounting event in ONE tx (sqlite crash-injection all-or-nothing). Divergence (rail or structural) => FROZEN + ENVELOPE_PLAN_DIVERGENCE (rail/detail/snapshot fingerprint), zero venue calls (INV-082). Quarantine pause: any envelope order in TIMEOUT_QUARANTINE blocks staging until resolved (INV-083). Venue leg in reconciliation.py: claims via the existing submission claim (INV-021 intact), submit/atomic-replace via WO-0019a seam w/ deterministic client_order_id; ambiguous->quarantine, transient->release+redrive (no budget double-spend), terminal->REJECTED; kill at last await blocks at the claim. 26 tests both stores; full gate green. Deferred: base.py ABC lift (needs tiny WO before review); intent->ORDERED linkage to WO-0020.

reason: Envelope pass wired into run_monitoring_tick after protection (protection always first), per-envelope failure isolation (policy exception freezes only that envelope; tick never crashes), EnvelopeTapeBuffer session tape (working data, restart re-warms), decision dispatch to the WO-0019 seam (fingerprinted snapshots, redrive-first, expiry/stale dispositions executed incl. CANCEL_AND_RETURN venue cancel), record-first fill bridge (ONE envelope-attributed FILL event; position folds once; INV-076 held), injectable policy clock. Cockpit Envelope Monitor with quarantine-grade prominence + approval form. 17 tests; full gate green. Deferred: intent->ORDERED linkage decision (planning seat), synthetic-fill bridge, interface-lift WO (3rd Protocol workaround).

title: Envelope chaos & property catalog — adversarial scenarios as executable tests
reason: Full catalog as named tests: 6 regime tapes (policy level, rails validated at every exit), thin-market edges, race interleavings (partial-fill plan/write, replayed replace-leg fill, kill at last await, flatten-mid-reprice), TTL dispositions both variants, phase-flip pin, 6 bad-data classes, budget drain + crash-restart persistence, and 3 hypothesis properties (no rail-violating venue call through the real pipeline; event-log replay reconstructs envelope state via an independent fold; dual-store agreement). TWO findings, both xfail(strict=True)-pinned: FINDING-W3-lase-pullback-structural-hold (P2, mechanism gap, W4/SOL input) and FINDING-W3-staged-order-outlives-preemption (P1, staged order survives flatten preemption -> WO-0024 drafted, human-gated). Zero app changes. Full gate green.

title: W3 adversarial review — Phase A (internal critics)
reason: Four independent critic subagents (spec-attacker, interleaving-attacker, test-critic 13-mutation matrix, completeness-critic) vs pinned f092ca7, H1-H11 inlined, fresh contexts. Compiled work/review/REV-0022/phase-a.md. Strong not-falsified list held: dedupe, single-ACTIVE, kill/HALTED atomicity (no constructible window), budget-restart, DST math, fresh-path floor/qty D-3, flatten status-level preemption, bad-data fail-closed. 7 FINDING files; WO-0024 amended pre-approval; WO-0025..0029 drafted. Fixed NOTHING (charter). Phase B pinned f092ca7, awaiting human (T4); Phase A results withheld from Codex pre-verdict per protocol.

reason: All 8 TC items + 2 amended (Phase A pins, baseline F841). reason: Approved in-chat (blanket proceed-except-SOL). plan_stage_envelope_action gains current_position; both stores pass their fill-derived projection read under the SAME lock/tx (D-3 extended to position, no await between read and write); redrive re-checks via seam Protocol get_position. title: Multi-leg envelope lifecycle + synthetic-fill bridge (REV-0022 F4+F5, paired)
reason: Approved in-chat (blanket proceed-except-SOL). F4: working-order predicate unified — decide() derives liveness from the event log (_live_working_order_id: newest submit/reprice action's order, dead on FILLED/CANCELED/REJECTED terminal; frozen decide() signature untouched); monitoring widens envelope history to include its orders' lifecycle events. Second legs (tranche, stop continuation, disposition re-entry) no longer false-freeze; INV-082 tripwire regains defect meaning. F5: monitoring._apply_inferred_fills routes envelope-minted orders through record_envelope_fill FIRST, canonical dedupe key, then append_fill — ceiling can no longer re-arm; stream replay dedupes to one. PIN_F4+PIN_F5 flipped green in place; new test_wo0025_multileg.py (4 predicate units + decide->stage integration + bridge, both stores). ADR-009 s5+s6 amended; INV-082 amended. 3 mutation-checks killed. WO-0018 fixtures gained realistic order_id. Full gate green. Deviation: on integration branch.

title: Supersession: refuse-while-live + staged sweep + conservation (REV-0022 F6)
reason: Approved in-chat (blanket proceed-except-SOL). Design decision (WO left open): refuse-while-live / sweep-while-staged / conserve-always — store makes no venue calls. plan_supersede_envelope gains working_order context (both stores pass it under lock/tx): venue-live order -> REJECT; staged CREATED -> swept via WO-0024 machinery in the same atomic unit; successor ceiling > old current remaining -> REJECT (widening requires cancel + fresh approval). PIN_F6a flipped green (fill-first race refuses stale draft; re-draft conserved); PIN_F6b's venue leg stays closed by INV-084. test_wo0027_supersession.py x3 both stores. 3 mutation-checks killed.
